# Hey Aaron! Marketing

> Hey Aaron! Marketing helps hardworking service pros across East Texas get found online and booked solid—without the usual tech headaches or agency fluff. We build sharp-lookin' websites, get you listed on Google, run ads that bring in real calls, and turn happy customers into repeat business. **First year free. Year two onward $250/mo. No contracts.**

Hey Aaron! Marketing is a marketing agency built specifically for service-pro businesses (plumbers, electricians, HVAC, roofers, handymen, lawn care, cleaners, contractors) across East Texas — Livingston, Cleveland, Coldspring, Goodrich, Onalaska, Trinity, Willis, Splendora, Shepherd, Riverside, New Waverly, Panorama Village, and surrounding communities.

**Rating:** 5.0 ⭐ on Google (15 reviews)

**Categories:** Marketing agency (primary) · Website designer · Advertising agency · Web hosting company

**Contact:**
- Phone: (713) 384-8985
- Email: hello@aaron.chat
- Website: https://aaron.chat
- Booking: https://cal.com/hey-aaron/in-person

**Hours:** Monday–Saturday 7:00 AM – 6:00 PM CT. Closed Sunday.

**Social:**
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/heyaaronmarketing
- LinkedIn (Aaron Phillips): https://www.linkedin.com/in/aaronphillips/
- X (Twitter): https://x.com/heyaaaron
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/heyaaaron
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@heyaaaron
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@heyaaronmarketing

## The Signature Offer

- [The House Special (Free Year)](https://aaron.chat/plans/house-special/): The signature offer. We build your complete marketing setup (website, Google Business Profile, citations across 50+ directories, lead tracking, monthly content) and run it free for 12 months. Year two onward: **$250/mo**. No setup fees. No contracts. Month-to-month after year one. Cancel anytime. We commit to one client per trade per service area — your competitor cannot also be our client.

## Pricing Model (Year 2+ Base + À La Carte Plates)

After the free first year, $250/mo covers hosting, ongoing website maintenance, Google Business Profile management, monthly performance reporting, and direct access to a real person (not a ticket queue). Want more growth? Stack à-la-carte "plates" month-by-month, drop them whenever.

## Combo Plates (Bundled Discounts)

- [The Get-Found Plate](https://aaron.chat/plans/get-found-plate/): **$549/mo** (save $99/mo, ~15%). Rank Me Local™ + Local Group Sharing™ = SEO + AI Search + neighborhood Facebook visibility. Requires website managed by Aaron.Chat. The foundation plate after the House Special.
- [The Phone-Ringer Plate](https://aaron.chat/plans/phone-ringer-plate/): **$349/mo + 12% of Facebook ad spend** (save ~50% vs. standalone). Most Popular. Facebook Ads™ + Adwords on Google™ + Lead Hustler™. Three lead channels managed by one team. Bundled Facebook Ads at 12% (vs 15% standalone).
- [The Regulars Plate](https://aaron.chat/plans/regulars-plate/): **$599/mo** (save $99/mo, ~14%). Review Rocket™ + Stay In Touch™. Reviews + retention engine. Requires website managed by Aaron.Chat.

## À-La-Carte Services

- [Built For You Website™](https://aaron.chat/services/built-for-you-website/): Complete custom website on Cloudflare hosting — design, copy, SEO foundations, AI Engine Optimization, monthly blog posts, citation cleanup, warm leads via Consent Resolve. **$250/mo** or one-time **$2,500**. Included with House Special year one.
- [Rank Me Local™](https://aaron.chat/services/rank-me-local/): Complete Local SEO + AI Search Optimization for Google, Google Maps, ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, Microsoft Copilot. City/neighborhood pages, schema markup, AEO/GEO, citation monitoring, monthly content. **$499/mo.** Available exclusively to clients whose website we build/manage.
- [Review Rocket™](https://aaron.chat/services/review-rocket/): Full Google Business Profile management + automated review requests (Google/Facebook/SMS/email) + **100 postcards per month** to past customers (design + print + mail + tracking) + reputation monitoring. **$299/mo.** Additional postcards: $0.79-$0.59 per piece at 101-1,000+ volumes.
- [Lead Hustler™](https://aaron.chat/services/lead-hustler/): Fully-managed lead-platform service. Zoho CRM setup + instant lead routing + daily platform optimization + lead-rejection credit recovery + tracking phone per platform — for up to 3 platforms (Thumbtack, HomeAdvisor, Angi, Nextdoor, Yelp, Houzz, Service Direct). **$499/mo.** Each additional platform **$99/mo**.
- [Facebook Ads™](https://aaron.chat/services/facebook-ads/): Facebook + Instagram ad management. You set monthly ad budget ($2,000-$50,000); we handle strategy, creative, targeting, daily optimization, lead delivery, reporting. **Flat 15% of media spend** ($300-$7,500/mo management fee). No mystery markup.
- [Adwords on Google™](https://aaron.chat/services/adwords-on-google/): Google Ads management for high-intent local searches. Campaign build, ad copy, bid management, keyword tuning. **$199/mo** management fee. Ad budget paid directly to Google.
- [Google Local Services Ads™](https://aaron.chat/services/google-local-services-ads/): Fully-managed Google LSA. Account setup, verification, Google Guaranteed eligibility, lead-dispute management, lead-quality optimization, monthly reporting. **$2,000/mo minimum OR 15% of LSA ad spend, whichever is higher, capped at $7,500/mo.**
- [Local Group Sharing™](https://aaron.chat/services/local-group-sharing/): 2-3 fresh posts per week shared with 10-20 local Facebook groups, town pages, community boards in your service area. **$149/mo** or **$1,490/yr** (2 months free).
- [Stay In Touch™](https://aaron.chat/services/stay-in-touch/): Customer retention engine — email + SMS marketing automation, anniversary/service-reminder workflows, referral campaigns, win-back sequences for dormant customers. **$399/mo.** Requires website managed by Aaron.Chat.

## Who We Serve

We work with established service-pro businesses (plumbers, electricians, HVAC technicians, roofers, handymen, lawn care, house cleaners, garage door repair, appliance repair, pest control, painters, general contractors, deck/fence builders, tree removal, locksmiths, mobile car services, power washers, machine shops, bail bondsmen). We focus on East Texas — Polk County, San Jacinto County, Montgomery County, Trinity County, Walker County, Liberty County, and adjacent regions.

**We do NOT work with:** SaaS startups, e-commerce shops, restaurants, law firms, medical practices. Service businesses only — that's what we're good at.

## Service-Area Exclusivity

We work with **one client per trade per service area**. If you become our client in Livingston as a plumber, we will not take on another Livingston plumber while you are active. First come, first served.

## Common Questions

**Q: Is the first year really free? What's the catch?**
A: Yes. We build your full marketing setup and run it for 12 months at no cost. No setup fee, no hidden charges. The bet: after 12 months of leads and reports, you stay on at $250/mo because it's working. If it's not, you walk and we eat the year. We only take clients we're confident will renew.

**Q: How does $250/mo cover everything in year 2+?**
A: $250/mo covers hosting, website maintenance, Google Business Profile management, citation monitoring, monthly reporting, and a real person on the phone. Paid ads, lead platforms, reviews, and customer follow-up are à la carte plates you add when you want them.

**Q: What if I want to leave?**
A: Month-to-month after year one. Give notice, we hand over everything (domain, hosting, Google Business Profile, customer list, content) and the next invoice doesn't go out. You keep the website.

**Q: How fast can we start?**
A: Kickoff call within 3 business days of agreement. Website live in 2-3 weeks. Google Business Profile live within week one. Citations rolling out across first 30 days. Meaningful Google traction in 60-90 days.

**Q: Who is Hey Aaron! Marketing?**
A: A marketing agency based in East Texas, built specifically for service-pro businesses. We work with plumbers, electricians, HVAC, roofers, handymen, and other trades across 12+ East Texas towns. We do not work with SaaS, e-commerce, restaurants, lawyers, or doctors.

**Q: How is this different from a Dallas/Houston agency?**
A: Dallas/Houston agencies sell retainers to companies that can afford "strategy" line items. We're built for service pros who care about leads and bookings. Plain-English reporting, no contracts, no setup fees, year one free. We know East Texas, the towns, the counties, and what your customers are actually searching for.

**Q: How do I book a call?**
A: Schedule directly at https://cal.com/hey-aaron/in-person or call (713) 384-8985.

## Comparisons (Honest Side-by-Side)

- [Hey Aaron! vs Dallas Marketing Agency](https://aaron.chat/compare/vs-dallas-agency/): Year-one cost ($0 vs $10-20K), contract length, accountability, service-pro fit
- [Hey Aaron! vs DIY (Wix/GoDaddy/Squarespace)](https://aaron.chat/compare/vs-diy-wix/): Time investment, SEO results, lead volume, total cost
- [Hey Aaron! vs Hiring an In-House Marketer](https://aaron.chat/compare/vs-hiring-employee/): Annual cost, expertise breadth, coverage, risk
- [Hey Aaron! vs Thumbtack/HomeAdvisor/Angi Only](https://aaron.chat/compare/vs-thumbtack-only/): Cost-per-lead, lead ownership, brand building, platform-change risk
